title: Sales Executive - Freight
description:
Job Requirements:
We are seeking a driven and experienced Sales Executive to lead freight operations and drive business growth in the Project Cargo Logistics sector. This role is ideal for a high-performing sales professional with deep industry knowledge, strong client engagement skills, and a hunter mentality. You will be responsible for expanding our customer base, managing key accounts, and orchestrating logistics solutions that meet complex supply chain needs.

Main Responsibilities:

  • Drive freight operations and business development for project cargo logistics.

  • Achieve revenue targets and acquire new and potential accounts.

  • Maintain consistent engagement with clients to ensure ongoing participation and satisfaction.

  • Manage and grow existing clientele while actively hunting for new business opportunities.

  • Lead customer presentations and proposals with professionalism and strategic insight.

  • Share market intelligence on customer needs and competitor developments with internal stakeholders.

  • Contribute to the enhancement of sales best practices and strategic account management.

  • Arrange, coordinate, and follow up on shipments to ensure smooth execution.

Requirements:

  • Education: Minimum Diploma, preferably in Logistics, Supply Chain, or Marketing.

  • Experience: At least 3-5 years of sales experience in Freight Forwarding.

  • Skills & Attributes:

    • Strong hunter acumen and proactive sales approach.

    • Solid understanding of supply chain operations and ability to align solutions with business offerings.

    • Excellent communication and presentation skills.

postedCompany.description:
Alliance 21 Pte Ltd is an established logistics company in Singapore with facilities at the Changi Airfreight Centre. The company aims to develop logistics hubs locally and worldwide by offering a broad range of value-added services beyond the traditional freight forwarding activities today.


Founded in 12 February 2002, our CEO, Mr Benjamin Ong is the driving force behind Alliance 21 Pte Ltd, which handles air freight business in Singapore. A visionary and aspiring leader, Mr Benjamin Ong led his team and broke away from the conventional freight forwarding by offering specialised logistics solutions to customers. Our determination to excel in what we do best has made us one of the top producing agents to many airlines annually and garnered accolades of The Emerging Enterprise Award in 2010, The Entrepreneur of the Year Award in 2012, SME Digital LEAP Awards in 2019, and Learning Enterprise Alliance Award in 2023.


Our sister company was set up in 2007 to provide sea freight, warehousing and transportation services. Together, Alliance 21 Group seeks to offer a seamless one-stop solution to our customers by providing multi-model transportation and total logistics solutions, delivering cargo door-to-door worldwide and offering services customized to specific needs.
postedCompany.name: ALLIANCE 21 PTE. LTD.
